title: Why Immunity Weakens After 40 (And How to Strengthen It)
seo_title: Why Immunity Weakens After 40 — How to Strengthen It
meta_description: Immune function naturally declines after 40 — a process called immunosenescence. Learn why it happens and evidence-based ways to strengthen your immune system.
tags: immunity, immune health, quercetin, women over 40, inflammation, aging
